sub_mechanisms: M_1: construct a measure-on-Grassmannian-bundle from the SGD parameter ensemble
M_2: compute the distributional mean-curvature of the ensemble
M_3: bound the basin radius via the mean-curvature norm
M_4: emit basin-stability certificate when bound is satisfied
stripped_llm_application: Track the SGD parameter ensemble as a measure on a Grassmannian bundle (a distributional submanifold); compute its mean curvature in a distributional sense; the basin radius around a minimizer is bounded by the inverse mean-curvature norm; the bound serves as a basin-stability certificate.
novelty_claim_stripped: Curvature-based pruning and Ricci-flow NN compression exist (RicciNets); preconditioned SGD curvature-noise floor (2511.19716) treats curvature pointwise. No existing method tracks the parameter ensemble as a measure-valued submanifold with distributional mean curvature.
